hero.description: Dedicated to the welfare, cultural preservation, and upliftment of the Gorkha community across India. Let's unite to build a stronger tomorrow.

features.heading: Unite for Our Heritage.
features.description: We are dedicated to preserving our rich cultural legacy, fostering unity, and securing a prosperous future for the Gorkha community.
features.card1Desc: Providing educational support and resources to empower our youth and build a knowledgeable community.
features.card2Desc: Organizing events to celebrate and promote Gorkha traditions, language, art, and vibrant heritage.
features.card3Desc: Creating a strong support network to assist members of the community in their social and economic upliftment.

items.text: When I needed help with land documentation, OneGorkha's legal team guided me through the entire process free of cost.
items.name: Karma Sherpa

items.text: The tailoring course I attended through OneGorkha has helped me start my own small business. I'm now financially independent.
items.name: Sunita Gurung

items.text: The Digital Gorkha ID has made it so much easier for me to access services and prove my identity. I'm proud to be part of this initiative.
items.name: Rajesh Thapa

timelineEvents.title: Recognition of Nepali Language
timelineEvents.desc: Marked the early acknowledgment of Gorkha linguistic identity, strengthening cultural roots in regions like Darjeeling.

timelineEvents.title: Gorkhaland Movement
timelineEvents.desc: A defining mass movement asserting identity, dignity, and the demand for political recognition.

timelineEvents.title: Formation of DGHC
timelineEvents.desc: First structured administrative setup giving Gorkhas partial self-governance.

timelineEvents.title: Included in the Constitution
timelineEvents.desc: Inclusion in the Eighth Schedule gave national recognition to the Nepali language and strengthened Gorkha identity across India.

timelineEvents.title: Establishment of GTA
timelineEvents.desc: Enhanced administrative powers and governance structure replacing DGHC.

timelineEvents.title: Community & Digital Unity
timelineEvents.desc: Organizations like Bhartiya Gorkha Seva Samaj actively working on education, cultural preservation, social welfare, and digital networking.

legacyPages.foundersSubtitle: Respected founders and senior members guiding the path toward a stronger, united Gorkha community.

ourStoryPage.title: Our Story – Bhartiya Gorkha Seva Samaj
ourStoryPage.spiritText: From the quiet hills of the Himalayas to towns and cities across India, the Gorkha spirit has always carried courage, humility, and dignity. For generations, Gorkhas have served society with honesty and dedication — as soldiers, teachers, workers, farmers, professionals, and caregivers. Often quietly, without seeking recognition, but always with pride in who we are.
ourStoryPage.needText: As times change, many Gorkhas now live far from their roots. Families are scattered. Young generations grow up without knowing the stories that shaped them. Slowly, connections fade. There is a growing need to reconnect and preserve this identity.
ourStoryPage.beginningTitle: Bhartiya Gorkha Seva Samaj was created to reconnect those threads.
ourStoryPage.beginningText: Bhartiya Gorkha Seva Samaj was created to bring the community together—uniting Gorkhas across India on a shared platform of support, culture, and progress.
ourStoryPage.lookingAheadText: We believe a connected community is a strong community. Our goal is to preserve our heritage while moving forward with confidence and opportunity.
ourStoryPage.invitationText: Whether you are a student, professional, elder, or well-wisher— Bhartiya Gorkha Seva Samaj welcomes you.

missionVisionPage.title: Mission & Vision
missionVisionPage.missionLead: Bhartiya Gorkha Seva Samaj is committed to strengthening the Gorkha community by providing meaningful support in everyday life while preserving our cultural identity. Our mission is to:
missionVisionPage.missionPoint1: Offer medical assistance to ensure health and well-being within the community
missionVisionPage.missionPoint2: Support families through marriage assistance, promoting stability and unity
missionVisionPage.missionPoint3: Encourage academic excellence through student recognition and motivation
missionVisionPage.missionPoint4: Preserve and promote heritage through cultural activities and traditions
missionVisionPage.missionEnd: We aim to build a supportive ecosystem where every individual feels valued, connected, and empowered.
missionVisionPage.visionLead: To create a united, self-reliant, and culturally proud Gorkha community that thrives across generations. We envision a future where:
missionVisionPage.visionPoint1: No member of the community is left without support in times of need
missionVisionPage.visionPoint2: Youth are motivated, recognized, and guided toward success
missionVisionPage.visionPoint3: Traditions and cultural values are preserved and celebrated
missionVisionPage.visionPoint4: Strong community bonds continue to grow despite changing times
